review_text: I grew tired of all the scents cluttered with menthol, pine, etc. I prefer scents like bergamont and sandalwood that blend with natural skin scents and that do not blast the olfactories of people around me. This is a tried and true scent. I am not a fan of "old time" products, particularly scents. But there are reasons that the venerable Old Spice keeps coming back. This not -repeat not- the original Old Spice scent, not since Procter and Gamble bought the product. But it is nice. More complex that I expected, and pleasant.

product_title: Y.U.M. Bar Dog Soap
product_description:
We bring you Y.U.M. Bar Dog Soap, an all-natural luxury bar soap for dogs hand-crafted by leading maker Indigo Wild.

Treat your furriest family member to this all natural, lather-rich soap bar. Not only does it keep your dog's coat looking clean, shiny and soft, but the essential oils also act as natural repellants for ticks and fleas.

Weight: 3 oz.

Indigo Wild is famous for its Zum Bar, a goat milk based soap. Indigo Wild chooses goat milk because it is naturally homogenized and has naturally occurring triglycerides (good fats). This results in the soap pH being nearly identical to our own skin and therefore less harsh than most commercial soaps.

Indigo Wild is focused on producing and distributing high quality, handmade, all natural goods. All natural raw materials make up each product. The essential oils used to add scent to Indigo Wild products contain such a high percentage of oils that they are considered to be therapeutic. Any products that require a preservative use natural solutions such as Vitamin E and rosemary. Indigo Wild products include over a hundred natural materials from as far away as Africa and are cruelty-free.

review_summary: GREAT Dog shampoo in a convenient bar
review_text: As we all know, washing our favorite canine friend can be a challenge at times as they don't always cooperate. For years I have been using products that I could find at my local pet shop and they have all been liquid shampoo allegedly formulated for a "dog's sensitive skin". The problem is that it takes a lot of shampoo and associated effort to get all the parts properly cleansed. On the one hand, my dog, a mini schnauzer, keeps moving so the shampoo I have just squeezed out onto my palm and am desperately trying to distribute to his chest or rear leg is dripping and even when I get it where it needs to be it never seems to be enough. I find myself using a lot of liquid shampoo to do the job and the constant need to pick up the bottle or pump more onto my hand gives my pooch an opportunity to try to get away from me further complicating the task. In the end, I use a lot of shampoo to get this relative small, long haired dog clean. Another issue for me is the smell of dog shampoo as most of them are overly scented and artificial smelling. I had often wished that I could find a bar of soap specially formulated for a canine that is not overly scented and leaves their coat nice and shiny. Well, this soap does it and does it well. When using a bar of soap there is no need to keep going back to the bottle to get more as you have all you need right in your hand. Washing the dog with this product takes a lot less time and it rinses out completely with ease. I can get my dog washed in just a few minutes and as I always have one hand on the dog, he is easier to control and more cooperative. I first wet him down completely avoiding his head but getting every part of his body nice and wet. Then I take the bar of soap in my hand and get every part nicely lathered up which is easier with the source of soap firmly in your hand. I then rinse his entire body and then wet his head as that is the part he really doesn't like. I then soap up his beard/muzzle, neck and head avoiding his eyes and quickly rinse him off with a hand held sprayer protecting his nose from direct contact with the water. After one final rinse of his body he is wrapped in a large towel and happily rubs his face and body into it drying himself off. The smell of the soap is wonderful and mild with a hint of cinnamon and sage and it leaves his fur nice and shiny. Fortunately, it does not irritate his skin or cause flaking or itching so all in all, we are both happy with the product. So why only four stars? It is a rather small bar (only 3 oz) for the price and doesn't last too long, so you should buy a few at a time. Once you have tried it you will never go back to liquid shampoo again.

review_text: On the plus side, this is a nice mug and an ok brush. On the negative side, this is the worst shaving soap I've ever used. It's a shame, too, because the mug is so narrow (to fit the Porter's soap) that it will not fit any other soap. I've tried several brands of shaving soap, including Taylor of Old Bond Street, the generic pharmacy brand, Proraso and Colonel Konk. They all perform better than Porter's - even the inexpensive generic from the corner store. Regardless of how hot or lukewarm the water is, or how much you use, or how hard or soft the water is, or how much time you spend lathering, this soap just does not lather. It remains weak and thin in any case. It's also too small to fit in a normal shaving dish or mug - it will only fit the Porter's mug. Save your money and your skin, use Taylor of Old Bond Street.

review_summary: Useful, but suction cups wear out far too soon.
review_text: I have had several brushes of this type, but the ones purchased recently have all had flimsy suction cups that all too soon become worthless, as the edges become torn. My oldest one has sturdier cups, but it slips occasionally. I bought several new ones from different source, apparently different manufacturers, but they are all the same. Moreover, the oldest one's bristles are rather stiff, while the newer ones are cheap and as the cups are flimsy, so are the bristles. As far as being useful, yes, these are very useful. As a one-handed man, I find it frustrating that the products so useful and needful to me are often either no longer available, or so cheaply made that they are not worth much. I just ordered an "Evriholder Glass Wash'R" (Evriholder Glass Wash'R_) for washing glasses, but I can see how it may be useful for washing hands when very little strength is available.

review_summary: Jasmine and rich color are a great combo!
review_text: This was my first LUSH item and so far it's still my favorite. The scent is very, very good - quite strong and deliciously so. The color it turns your bath is very deep green, verging on blue without staining my tub. I found it very entertaining to watch the candy flower melt in the water. This thing is so big, you could cut it in half for two baths if you felt like -- the scent's so strong it probably wouldn't suffer much for it either. However, I'm a decadent and can't resist throwing the whole thing in and relaxing while it fizzes its way around the tub. It leaves my whole bathroom smelling of jasmine for hours after, which is saying something considering how big my bathroom is! A definite must-have for jasmine lovers!

review_text: I LOVE the smell of Jasmine and more often than not products claim to smell like Jasmine but end up being too chemically strong or off in one way or another. The All That Jasmine bath bomb is perfect! The smell is not overpoewering but just the right strength and it is not a chemical smell. It's sweet and fresh and romantic! I am not usually a person who likes scented products very much, many perfumed products tend to give me headaches but not this, it was perfect! Even my 5 year old daughter loved it and begged me to buy her some. I will definately need to stock up on this one!

product_title: Jason Pure Natural Purifying Tea Tree Hand Soap -- 16 fl oz
product_description: This botanical wash gently cleanses and safely nourishes your skin with Vitamin E and Pro-Vitamin B5. This natural blend of Tea Tree Oil and Calendula Extract balances, purifies, and soothes your skin. Born in 1959, JASON was one of the first to offer natural products without harsh chemicals. review_summary: ... another website & I have to say that I love it. I soaked mine in boiling hot water ...
review_text: I purchased this exact soap by Fiat Luxe on another website & I have to say that I love it. I soaked mine in boiling hot water for a few hours, the instructions do say to soak the whole product in hot water prior to the first use. The soap was quite sudsy if you ask me! My skin felt clean and exfoliated after I use this soap. I've been using it for 2 or 3 weeks and I have not run out of soap. I'm not sure what other reviewer's are expecting. You do have to work the soap out, twisting it over in your hands a couple of times to get the soap out. I love it. Suds doesn't always equal clean, however, but I just want to express that I didn't have an issue with my soap sudsing, I'm on here looking to buy this soap for some family members.

review_text: $12-$14 for a bar that fits in the palm of your hand and does nothing more than a Loofah (I agree, no suds is a good thing for your skin, but there are better natural soaps out there). I bought two bars: what scent did you smell, you pratically have to shove it up your nostrils to smell the fake odors. Don't waste your time or money. Pure junk. Get a Loofah.

review_text: This soap takes a minute to get used to. I was expecting some suds, but there was none at all. Thinking I had wasted my money on an expensive soap, I was greatly annoyed. But when I was drying off I felt something I hadn't in a while. Perfectly smooth skin. Baby's bottom smooth and I felt surprisingly clean. This is wonderful, but if you want lots of lather to dry out your skin this product will not make you happy.

CLEAN & CLEAR MORNING BURST Body Wash
Between spending time with friends, being at school, and all the other stuff in between, you can't always get the eight hours of sleep you need to rejuvenate yourself for the next day. If you ever feel like you need a little boost to get going in the morning, try CLEAN & CLEAR MORNING BURST body washes. These delectable body washes are designed to get your body moving by stimulating your senses and energizing you all over. Infused with exotic fruit extracts suspended with BURSTING BEADS, this body wash gently cleanses your skin. The result is clean, fresh, and gorgeous skin. This product is available in three exotic scents. You can feel the BOOST of mango and papaya, the SPLASH of wildberry and guava, or the CHARGE of pomegranate and orange zest. The bubbly formula works to leave you feeling clean and refreshed. CLEAN & CLEAR MORNING BURST products deliver invigorated and refreshed skin right when you need it most. Squeeze onto a wet pouf or washcloth. Work into a rich lather and rinse, avoiding eye area. The makers of CLEAN & CLEAR, experts in teen skincare, know that having a busy life and not always getting all the sleep you need makes skin look dull and tired. They think everyone should have skin that looks and feels invigorated and energized, especially in the morning. The makers of CLEAN & CLEAR believe beauty comes from being confident, comfortable, and secure in your own skin. They believe your skin is unique and your skin care needs are constantly changing. They believe the more you know about managing your skin, the better it will look. They believe that by getting noticeably clearer, more beautiful skin, you'll become a more beautiful you. And they believe they can help. CLEAN & CLEAR MORNING BURST Charge Pomegranate and Orange Zest Body Wash (Pack of Two 16-Ounce Bottles).

product_description: Get soft feet with Freeman Bare Foot Scrub. Simple to use, you can readily incorporate it into your self-care routine to get your feet looking the way you desire. This Freeman foot scrub can help remove the dry skin feet tend to get from footwear or going barefoot. The soothing additives ensure your feet feel a deeper relief from the daily stress of regular use. Pamper yourself just a bit at home or on the go with this specially created formula.

product_title: Raw African Black Soap in a Reusable Ziplock BAG
product_description:
SmellGood; has been importing top quality black soap from Africa more than 10 years. African black soap is made in west Africa from ash of locally harvested plants and barks such as plantain, cocoa pods, palm tree leaves, and shea tree bark. The actual ingredients and receipt are highly kept secret. SmellGood; African black soap has been known for its excellent cleaning capability but soft and gentle touch on skin.
Packaging: African black soap bar is manufactured and packaged in basic plastic film wrapping only. When raw African black soap is exposed to the air during transportation and storage, it will have a thin white colored film. The films are not mold, but are caused by raw natural of the black soap as it absorb water from the air.
Storage: Keep sealed black soap in the dry and cool place.
Warning: External use only. Consult your dermatologist or test it out if you have known allergy.

review_text: I don't know that I've ever written a 5-star review, but this one's worthy. . After years of trial and error and money down the drain, I I've finally found the perfect face, body and hair cleanser, being as naturally oily as I am. I use to have periodic breakout, now after using this particular Black Soap I've experienced absolutely no breakouts of any type with this. I lather my face and leave it on while I shower the rest of my body; youll l fill the healing sensation on your face. I recommend that you use a moisturizer or acne prone moisturizer (for those of you who have acne problems) and a sun block. My face is flawless and I will never use anything else on my face, body and natural hair. My son always had razor bumps; its now clear and smooth. Ive had numerous people compliment me skin. I use it as an all-natural shampoo for my natural hair and it lathers up and rinses out effortlessly; I use it on my body and can now wear back out blouses, because my back is clear, smooth and soft. I love this soap and will never be without it. For those of you that say that this Black Soap doesnt work; I say, give a chance; your facial issues didn't happen overnight, your face will not clear up overnight. Allow the soap time to flush out the toxins; your face Will clear up.

review_text: I'm a bit of a snob when it comes to soap. It has to smell good but not be too overpowering. It has to lather nicely but not melt away after only a few showers. It absolutely cannot dry my skin out and in an ideal world leaves my skin softer and feeling fresh. These bars are amazing on all counts. While some scents are more powerful than others, on the whole they're all quite pleasant and won't leave you feeling like you just pulled a 9-5 in a potpourri mill. I take 2-3 showers a day depending on when I work out and on average each bar lasts around 3 weeks (I don't leave it in a puddle of water nor do I put it somewhere where the shower water can eat away at it). Finally, being a true organic product that retains it's natural glycerin and doesn't contain any of the artificial hardening chemicals or synthetic waxes that commercial soaps do, these soaps leave my skin feeling amazing. Getting ready to grind out another day of work, refresh after a work out or slip comfortably into bed, this is DEFINITELY my soap of choice.

review_summary: Don't let the light weight fool you - these are super towels!!!
review_text: It took a little adjustment, but once we realized the advantages of these towels' superior absorbency, quick drying time and great size (they're huge!), we love these Turkish peshtemals. We feel like we're in on a well-kept secret, having gotten the hint during travels in Europe. "Fluffy" terrycloth towels now seem clunky to us, and we do not miss their musty smell. It's so much easier to wrap around my roomy peshtemal and wear it from the bathroom to the closet, and I welcome the new space in my linen cabinet. I've furnished my vacation rental with Turkish towels now, but have kept the terrycloth ones there, too, and look forward to guest opinions. These particular ones are well made and very reasonably priced, and the colors - how nice to have such bright choices! The vendor communicated well and quickly to answer my questions, and the towels arrived much faster than you'd think they would from Turkey. I am extremely pleased with these, and will be getting more for gifts.

review_text: This is the third time I've ordered these peshtemal from Turkey, I've used different merchants. These are the same towels I've been buying, and this is the best price and best shipment--fast and nicely intact. Each towel was carefully packed in its own glassine envelope and presented in a small cotton fabric sack, with two handles. This is packaging I can actually reuse, and enhances these towels as gifts. As with all the towels I've bought, these are colorfast and wash and drip-dry really well. The colors are vibrant and work nicely together. Thank you for an excellent product and swift shipping! I will definitely order again. NOTE: These are advertised to be 100cm x 175cm long (39x69 inches). I didn't measure them prior to washing. But after a cold wash and drip dry, these measured 91cm x163cm (36x64 inches). This is typical of other peshtemal I've purchased, so be aware of the discrepancy in measurement.

review_text: Since I was curious and nobody had yet posted, I decided to post the labeling of this soap. Now, my bottle looks different, but I am assuming the product inside is the same. The bottle says: "With pure and simple ingredients, our black soap is produced traditionally from unrefined, certified Fair Trade shea butter and palm kernel oil. No chemical preservatives, color enhancers, or fragrances. Unscented for sensitive skin. Pump small amount into hand, lather and apply to body with water for gently cleansing. Suitable for hair, face, hands and body. Ingredients: Purified water, African Black Soap* (Saponified Unrefined Shea (Butyrospermum parkii) Butter* and Unrefined Palm Kernel (Elaeis guineesis) oil). * Certified Fair Trade by IMO" My review is that it is a fine soap. I did not like it much for shampoo, as it left my hair not so squeaky clean. And the soap is a chocolate brown color. So if there is residue in the sink left there by kiddos, it really looks messy quickly. But it totally meets my needs for a non-scented, chemical-free soap.

review_summary: Soap melts like all of zest soaps
review_text: I bought the two-pack Zest soap with cocoa butter and shea (UPC 816559012612) from my local grocery store. This soap is like all of zest soaps--they melt when wet, so please when done using be sure there's no water in the soap dish. Otherwise, the product will dissolve and you've wasted your money. It does moisturize the skin and the scent is not strong. This soap does have red 4, blue 1, yellow 5, shea butter and cocoa butter. The shape of the bar is raised in the center, sleek-like, and it's a light brown color. If you buy this soap or anything Zest brand, keep it out of water when not using. I prefer a more natural soap that offer more uses than zest brand soaps (and other commercial brands of soap).

review_summary: Cleanest feel, soaps up well and lasts over a month!
review_text: I read that sponges need to be changed once a month... This product combines a body wash and sponge in one! The skin feels so clean each time I used it! And the sponge gives a gentle scrubbing sensation. To prolong its life, I first wash my hair (my body gets wet) turn off the water and scrub/soap-up my whole body with the Spongelle. Once done, I simply rinse off with the shower. This helps reduce water waste and prolong Spongelle's useful life-span. About a month and a half after first use, I start adding some of my favorite body wash. And after three months I replace it with a new one.

product_title: Geranium Essential Oil (10 ml - .33 oz)
product_description:
Geranium essential oil is a type of essential oil commonly used in aromatherapy. Sourced from the flowers and leaves of the Pelargonium graveolens plant, geranium essential oil is said to offer a variety of health benefits.

Inhaling the aroma of geranium essential oil (or absorbing geranium essential oil through the skin) is thought to transmit messages to a brain region involved in controlling emotions.
This brain region, known as the limbic system, also influences the nervous system.

Aromatherapy proponents suggest that essential oils may affect biological factors, including heart rate, stress levels, blood pressure, breathing, and immune function.

Health Benefits:
Alleviates anxiety and stabilizes emotions.
Heals broken capillaries, bruises, and circulatory disorders.
Eliminates fluid retention.
Soothes insect bites, stings, burns, and minor wounds.
Relieves sore throat and lymphatic congestion.

Aromatherapy Benefits:
Balancing and calming.
Good for anxiety, depression and neuralgia.
Has an harmonizing effect on the mind and emotions which makes it fantastic for treating stress.
It is both uplifting and a sedative and so when used in the bath is very refreshing and relaxing.


These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease. For external use only. Do not use if you are pregnant, breast-feeding or you have seizure disorders. Keep out of reach of children. Please consult an essential oils reference source for safety tips and suggested dilution ratios.

review_text: I can testify that these soaps are very fragrant! The Golden Crown is citrus-based, for anyone who is wondering. For my own use I would not go for such a strong scent, but this seemed like a suitable gift. I'm not delighted with the color of the organza bag and the ribbon. I guess it's supposed to be silver - which might be appropriate for bridesmaids or something - but when I look at it I see *grey*. Still, I think my friend will be pleased. I am a cautious shopper. I'm aware that there is a lot of deceptive packaging and labeling out there. People can be led to believe that a product is all natural when it is not. But I am convinced that the Keomi soaps are made from pure ingredients, so I'm happy.

review_summary: Wow! The Best Smelling Organic Soaps I Have Ever Tried! Surpassed All Of My Expectations!
review_text: I am a huge fan of soaps! Every time I walk around the mall I am looking for that little shop that carries specialty soaps, and I can smell the scent of the soaps from far away, which draws in each and every time. I am constantly on the hunt of a great quality soap, and I am pretty picky and read every ingredient that is on that package. Why? Because I want to make sure that there are no additives, no colors, no preservatives and no artificial scents. All of those demands are pretty hard to find, and on top of all of that I am also looking for a great quality soap that is not too expensive! When I first received the Keomi Skincare Organic Handmade Soap- Set of Two in the box, I knew right away that that box contained soap, because I can smell the amazing scent from outside the box. But just because it smells great it doesn't mean that it is high quality. But I was pretty impressed to find out that not only the Keomi Skincare Organic Handmade Soaps have no preservatives, but they also contain no artificial colors or scents, sulfate free, nut free, and have no animal testing! The entire shower smelled amazing from the time those two bar of soaps entered my bathroom! Talk about an all natural fragrance that fills your entire bathroom for many weeks! Best of all, it does not bother my sensitive nose, which is a huge problem for me that I usually get from lotions and soaps. The two soaps that I received were the Golden Crown and Luscious Lavender. They both smell so delicious, and my sensitive skin absolutely loved them! They are moisturizing and do not dry my skin whatsoever. I would love to see these bar of soaps last a little longer, as they seemed to run out quicker than other soaps I have owned before. Plus, I noticed that the next day when I was ready to use the bar of soap again, it tends to stick pretty well to my shower caddy and is hard to pick up and use without trying harder than usual to "un-glue" them from the shower caddy. The Luscious Lavender is my favorite scent of the two because it is so relaxing to the senses, and my skin still smells amazing after the shower for many more hours to come! I received this product for free in exchange for my review. All of my opinions are 100% my own. I hope that this review was helpful in making your purchase decision.

review_summary: Aromatic Wonderfulness in a Bar of Soap
review_text: When I first received the package of the Sample Set of Handmade soap by Keomi, I could smell the wonderfulness of them. Each bar is extremely aromatic. My husband keeps asking me where the new diffuser is because they smell so strong, in a good way. The Sample Set contains 4 different scents. Sea Breeze. Refresh your skin with this bar of soap. It contains Pure Olive Oil, Palm Kernel Oil, Avocado, Grape Seed, and Coconut Oil, as well as Cocoa Butter, Dead Sea Salt and Dead Sea Clay, Seaweed. It is scented with a blend of Lavender, Oakmoss and Fir. Golden Crown is considered Keomi's Most Luxurious Soap. It is made with Pure Olive Oil, Avocado Oil, Safflower Oil, Coconut Oil, Palm Kernel Oil, Grape Seed Oil, Apricot and Rice Bran. Infused with Calendula Flowers, Oils of Orange, Fir and Frankincense. Luscious Lavender. Relax and unwind with Lavender. Made with Pure Olive Oil, Palm Oil, Sunflower Oil, Avocado Oil, Apricot Oil, Coconut Oil, Grape See Oil, Safflower Oil, Rice Bran and Cocoa Butter. Scented with a blend of 3 Lavenders. Green Tea Goddess. Help your skin stay young looking. Made with Olive Oil, Grape Seed Oil, Coconut Oil, Palm Oil, Avocado Oil and Cocoa Butter, Organic Green Tea, Nettle, Shavegrass and Comfrey Root. Scented with Clary Sage, Orange and Clove. My personal favorite is the Golden Crown. It smells so enchanting. The blend of the scents are truly heavenly. The sample set is a great way to choose which scent you like best. Currently Keomi is offering a 2 and 4 bar sample set for FREE. You just have to pay shipping and handling charges. It is strongly recommended that when using Keomi's soaps, that you store them in a dry place away from a stream of water or under a counter with metal pipes. Keep them in a soap dish that drains, not pools. And when using the soaps, don't rub directly on body, but use a washcloth, hands or other material. This will help the soap last longer, and help prevent it from becoming a liquid soap. Your skin will feel soft, smooth and silky after using this soap. It is not drying at all. The fragrance will linger on for awhile, so keep that in mind if you plan to use perfume afterwards. You will smell clean and fresh after using their bars of soap. Pros: Very strongly scented, which lingers after using. Skin feels awesome afterwards. Very moisturizing. Don't be tempted to just stash them away in your dresser drawers or closets, unless you purchase extras to do so. Let your skin become silky soft by using these. I highly recommend this product, despite the fact I was given an opportunity to receive this free in exchange for my honest opinion

review_summary: A day at the spa in your own home
review_text: Unlike some other soaps, these soaps are organic and you can see the natural ingredients within each soap. The Golden Crown which was rich in a lemon scent, Green Tea Goddess which smelled like green tea and was very earthy, Luscious lavender which smelled like lavender, and sea breeze which was reminiscent of a day at the beach with the ocean-like notes to it. The soaps were fairly smaller in size than those that you can purchase at the grocery store or beauty store and lasted about 7 days each. However, the product smelled so nice and it was a treat each time to use this product. At first, the soap was a little hard to spread on a washcloth but after the first use, it spread so easily. The scents did feature the aromatherapy benefits and helped to relax me as I took my shower since the scent was strong and lasting. I loved that the soaps had a more natural smell and did not smell so generic like store brands tend to. These soaps are great for treating yourself on those stressful days and feeling like you are at the spa.

review_summary: Each of these Soaps Smells so Wonderful and Unique
review_text: I received a gift set in a cute little silver mesh, drawstring bag from Keomi Skincare in exchange for my honest feedback and opinion. Inside the bag were 4 neatly wrapped soap bars. These soaps are aromatherapy grade and if you smell them, you will see why. They smell so wonderful. I love that these soaps are 100% vegan, gluten free, cruelty free, sulfate/paraben/petrochemical-free, and contain no artificial fragrances or colors. What more could you ask for in a soap? In my little gift set, I received four different scented soaps: Sea Breeze, Golden Crown, Green Tea Goddess, and Luscious Lavender. Im about ready to cry because these smell so good. Im not even exaggerating. The soaps are naturally colored and I think the colors of each variety accurately reflects the intended scent. The soaps don't over lather by themselves, but I think that's because of being sulfate free. However, I used the Luscious Lavender with a body puff and it lathered just fine. Overall, these are wonderful soaps and this sample set is the perfect introduction to the company and would make a great gift for just about anyone.

review_summary: The Best Mud I ever Tried
review_text: You read right! 11 whopping pounds of dead sea mud from Israel straight to my front door for reviewing and testing purposes from the company called Adovia. Because there was so much mud in an 11 pound container, I decided to transfer some into little jars and some plastic zip lock bags. I recently reviewed Dead Sea Mud from a different company and of course it wasn't 11 pounds worth of it but I got to try it for the first time. That particular mud left a tingling prickly sensation while the mask was drying on my face, so I didn't want to keep it on for too long but I did leave it on for 15 minutes. The texture in the Adovia mud mask is creamier then the other mud mask I had previously tried on. I felt no tingling or prickling whatsoever with the Adovia mud mask. With the other one, after application, I had to put moisturizer on to get some of the redness down. Although it left my skin soft. But the experience that I just received with this mud mask from the Adovia was beyond my expectations. My face had no redness and it was baby bottom soft if you know what I mean. Lol All I can say was wow! I did apply my coconut oil afterwards because that is my routine but in reality after the mask I did not need moisturizing. It felt incredible I couldn't stop touching my face. Next on the list with this mud is my neck and legs and a little goes on a long way and it's so easy to rinse off with warm water.

product_title: Bali Soap - Ylang-Ylang Natural Soap Bar, Face or Body Soap Best for All Skin Types, For Women, Men & Teens, Pack of 3, 3.5 Oz each
product_description:
Bali Soap's traditional collection is comprised of 3 individual exciting formulations. Uniquely textured with organic botanicals from the Indonesian archipelago. Each of these soaps has a bubbly lather and rinses off clean without residue. Each bar has its own unique feel that ranges from smooth to lightly exfoliating and one or two bars with some extra grit to really scrub your skin clean. Our base oils provide a healthy lather that cleans and leaves your skin feeling moisturized. We employ the cold process soap making method and do not add heat or chemicals to the soaps we mix by hand. This process produces a bar full of natural glycerin, which is a by-product of the soap making process. Unlike most soap on the market today, we do not remove this glycerin from our soap because it is a humectant, which helps attract moisture to the skin and can be gentle enough for even the driest and most sensitive of skin. Bali Soaps pack of three ultra-nourishing moisturizing bars thoroughly cleanses, gently exfoliates, combats pathogens, soothes itching, eliminates flaking and moisturizes fragile, damaged, dry skin. May also help to relieve people suffering with skin conditions such as: dermatitis, eczema, psoriasis and rosacea. Each bar of soap is individually wrapped. These soaps are great for placing in your guest bathroom, inside a mason jar, or as gifts for every occasion. If you are looking for a great natural soap bar that provides real skin conditioning, moisturizing, and is gentle enough to use all over then search no further.
  • No Parabens
  • No Phthalates
  • No Sulphates
  • Suitable for all skin types including the most sensitive

review_text: This was extremely sandy so I suggest this for people who have extremely dry skin. Otherwise, you could risk an uncomfortable bath/shower. I wasn't aware of this but a scrub is different than a body wash. Not only does it have a sandy texture, it's very moisturizing (almost like a oil). It does not sud up but nonetheless was very pleasant. I would recommend using this after you have already washed with soap or body wash.

review_text: I've taken many nice baths with this pillow already! There are many pluses to the pillow! I've had blow up pillows before - they try to float above the water line, which can be a problem depending on the depth of your tub; and they can deflate while you are using them. I've also had pillows which are more like pillows - the stuffing is soggy and weighs them down, the water they soak up gets cold and can run down your shoulders; and worst of all, the water they hold on to can cause them to mold! This pillow takes the best parts of both types of pillows and eliminates the cons! The pillow is a rubbery material with a nice plush top side. it doesn't soak up water or hold onto water. But it's stuffed, so it has a nice cushion for your neck and the base of your skull. It isn't inflated, so it doesn't deflate or try to float. It'll float if you have it detached, but it comes with 4 large and strong suction cups to hold it in place on the tub wall. I also love the fold in it so that it contours to the edge of the tub. This has been fantastic and has me spending more time reading and lounging in the tub!

review_summary: I think this may have been previously used. Moldy suction cups... yuck!

For the sake of the review - I at least tried to stick it to the bathroom wall and yes 3 of the 6 suction cups stuck, the others did not. If this came out of the Amazon warehouse - all I can say is EWWWW, if this came out of the sellers warehouse - or private home - omg this is gross! review_text: What I like about it: 1. It has seven suction cups to put it in the bathtub and keep it there. 2. The material has some texture to it, enough to help it not be too slippery. 3. The texture is small and not uncomfortable. 4. It is quite big, about 15 inches across. 5. It's not too big and can fit in most bathtubs. 6. It's light. 7. The cushions are very soft. What I don't like: 1. It has an appearance that it is obviously inexpensive. I received this product at a discounted price in exchange for an honest review.

review_text: The bath pillow is softer than I expected, based on other reviews. One said it was "plastic" but I wouldn't call this plastic. I'm not really sure what it is but it isn't a plastic or vinyl. It has a feel of memory foam at first, but it isn't. It was comfortable to me, though it doesn't fit correctly in the bathtub at the rental house I'm in now, it will fit better in my new house I will be moving into in a week. (My fault, not a flaw in the pillow) I was still able to make it work with what I have now as long as my head was on it, as far as the top part goes. The bottom part was still stuck to the tub wall. At first sight, the suction cups appear to be flattened, as in damaged or not functional. They are supposed to be this way and they work fine. I was rather amazed that they worked lol. I have never seen a "recessed" type suction cup like these. In my pics you can see how flat they are. The benefit to this is that you won't feel them through the pillow. I rather like this pillow. I received this bath pillow at a discount for my honest review and opinion.

review_summary: Love the smell, and it's effective, but ouch!
review_text: I really wanted to love this. I have the cream and the smell is divine (particularly if you like grapefruit, which I do), but I don't really love having to stick my fingers in the jar. And then have to wash them, which I have already just done because who would stick dirty fingers into this? So having read the reviews, I thought it would be perfect. There was the one review about sensitive skin which became irritated, but I paid it little heed. I guess I have a different type of sensitive skin. No rash or irritation, but just the very act of applying this stuff hurts!!! It is quite dry, not moist like other stick deodorants, so I need to rub hard to make sure it gets applied to the skin. And, perhaps it's cause I'm a red head, but I seem to have tender skin. I stopped using it for a while, because it hurt that much, then decided to try again. I find I'm sort of getting used to it, but the initial rub or two just makes me want to say "Ouch:" The effectiveness is fine. I've needed a second application after about 8 hours of the super hot days we've had this summer, otherwise it's good till I go to sleep. I guess it's back to the cream for me.

review_summary: It works! And no plastic!! Truly eco-friendly :D
review_text: I started with the cream version of Taylor's Pits in a glass jar (hippie pits scent) and then tried the stick (so fresh scent). Love them both, though the cream does seem to be a bit stronger. The stick is awesome because I can throw it in my bag and reapply on the go (like if I run some errands after jogging and before my shower). It's definitely nice to have the solid stick and not have to use my fingers for reapplying on-the-go. I will also use this if I'm in a hurry and not able to squeeze in a shower (I'm a mom of an infant, a toddler and a teenager!) on any given day... it's just that much easier... on some days, seconds count!! On top of the effectiveness and ease of use, this is COMPLETELY plastic-free, which just makes me so happy!! It's like this company really, truly, understands the full picture! ;) Oh - and just like with the cream, another big plus with this deodorant is that it doesn't leave those annoying, white deodorant marks on my clothes!! Added bonus!!!

review_text: I was very excited to leave convensional deodorants and stop using harsh chemicals on my armpits, so I bought this one, actually it had good reviews but I am going to put some things on the table: 1-I live in a really hot country (Dominican Republic summer is hell like) 2-I go to gym 5 days a week 3-I go to uni 5 days a week I am a pretty moving person by this time and I kind of got disappointed when I tested this deodorant and it didn't work so well.
